message:
Refactor geo_open package with OCSF enrichment operators (#130)

* Refactor geo_open package with OCSF enrichment operators

Renames geo-open package to geo_open (underscores for UDO namespacing)
and adds two specialized OCSF enrichment operators:

- geo_open::enrich::ocsf::country for country-only enrichment
- geo_open::enrich::ocsf::country_asn for country and ASN enrichment

Removes subscribe/publish pipeline pattern in favor of direct UDO usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor geo_open enrichment into unified operator

Combined the separate `geo_open::enrich::ocsf::country` and
`geo_open::enrich::ocsf::country_asn` operators into a single
`geo_open::enrich` operator with an optional `asn=true/false`
parameter. This provides a simpler, more flexible interface for
users and reduces code duplication.

Updated examples, tests, and changelog to reflect the new
operator syntax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +0,0 @@
----
-name: Receive GeoIP-enriched OCSF events
-description: |
-  Produces a feed of OCSF events with GeoIP information.
----
-
-subscribe "{{ inputs.enrich-output }}"

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+---
+title: OCSF enrichment operator with optional ASN support
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-16T07:11:11.89317Z
+---
+
+The new `geo_open::enrich` operator enriches OCSF Network Activity events
+with country information. Use `asn=true` to include Autonomous System Number
+data.
+
+The previous subscribe/publish pipeline pattern has been replaced with direct
+UDO usage in user pipelines.

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+name: Enrich OCSF Network Activity with Geo Data
+description: |
+  Enriches OCSF Network Activity events with country and ASN information.
+---
+
+from {src_endpoint: {ip: 1.1.1.1}, dst_endpoint: {ip: 8.8.8.8}},
+     {src_endpoint: {ip: 9.9.9.9}, dst_endpoint: {ip: 208.67.222.222}}
+geo_open::enrich asn=true

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+description: |
+  Enriches OCSF Network Activity events with geolocation data from Geo Open.
+args:
+  named:
+    - name: asn
+      type: bool
+      default: false
+      description: Include ASN (Autonomous System Number) information in addition to country.
+---
+
+// NB: We call context::enrich outside the `if` block because putting it inside
+// triggers an assertion failure in if.cpp:567. Using `key=src_endpoint?.ip`
+// handles null keys gracefully.
+
+let $ctx = "geo-open-country-asn" if $asn else "geo-open-country"
+
+context::enrich $ctx, key=src_endpoint?.ip, into=_src_geo
+if _src_geo != null and _src_geo.country.iso_code != "None" {
+  src_endpoint.location.country = _src_geo.country.iso_code
+}
+if $asn and _src_geo != null {
+  src_endpoint.autonomous_system = {
+    name: _src_geo.country.AutonomousSystemOrganization,
+    number: _src_geo.country.AutonomousSystemNumber.int(),
+  }
+}
+drop _src_geo
+
+context::enrich $ctx, key=dst_endpoint?.ip, into=_dst_geo
+if _dst_geo != null and _dst_geo.country.iso_code != "None" {
+  dst_endpoint.location.country = _dst_geo.country.iso_code
+}
+if $asn and _dst_geo != null {
+  dst_endpoint.autonomous_system = {
+    name: _dst_geo.country.AutonomousSystemOrganization,
+    number: _dst_geo.country.AutonomousSystemNumber.int(),
+  }
+}
+drop _dst_geo

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-id: geo-open
+id: geo_open
 name: Geo Open
 author: Tenzir
 author_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/.tenzir.svg
-package_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/geo-open/package.svg
+package_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/geo_open/package.svg
 
 description: |
   Free IP geolocation using Geo Open MMDB databases from CIRCL, the Computer
@@ -15,21 +15,8 @@ description: |
   more detailed network analysis, with automatic daily updates to ensure
   accuracy.
 
-inputs:
-  enrich-input:
-    name: Enrichment input topic
-    description: |
-      The name of the input topic used for OCSF event enrichment.
-    default: ocsf
-
-  enrich-output:
-    name: Enrichment output topic
-    description: |
-      The name of the output topic used for OCSF event enrichment.
-    default: ocsf-geo
-
 categories:
-- contexts
+  - contexts
 
 contexts:
   geo-open-country:

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+// Pick one DB for deterministic results.
+let $mmdb = "https://cra.circl.lu/opendata/geo-open/mmdb-country-asn/2025-12-03-GeoOpen-Country-ASN.mmdb"
+
+from_http $mmdb {
+  context::load "geo-open-country-asn"
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+fixtures:
+  - node
+suite: download
+timeout: 120
+skip: requires downloading MMDB from external server
